intro: Chrysodracon halapepe, also known as Halapepe, is a plant species native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of pain, fever, and skin irritations. Bioactive constituents of Chrysodracon halapepe include alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
